subject: Nudge: Slice A commit lane awaiting action
body: Controller nudge: Slice A has Fronded GO and Embered marshal ACK. Please proceed with the exact-bundle commit protocol if you are able: short git:index/head claim, exact commit-queue intent, stage only the five Slice A paths, verify staged, commit, complete queue, close Slice A claims, report residue. If you are blocked or no longer able to take the commit lane, reply with BLOCKED so Pearly can reroute. Keep Nebulous files and coordination residue out.
